findings.evidence: PR lines 56-128 define the declarations by `H.map (_root_.FundamentalGroup.fundamentalGroupMulEquivOfPath γ : _ →* _)`, `Subgroup.mem_map_equiv`, `.subgroupMap H`, `MulEquiv.coe_subgroupMap_apply`, `MulEquiv.subgroupMap_symm_apply`, and `MulEquiv.normal_map_iff`; Mathlib has `fundamentalGroupMulEquivOfPath` at `mathlib/Mathlib/AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroupoid/FundamentalGroup.lean:49`, `Subgroup.mem_map_equiv` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Map.lean:157`, `MulEquiv.mapSubgroup` at `:433`, `MulEquiv.subgroupMap` and coercion lemmas at `:541-551`, and `MulEquiv.normal_map_iff` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Basic.lean:952`.
findings.fix: Replace this wrapper layer with direct use of `(FundamentalGroup.fundamentalGroupMulEquivOfPath γ).mapSubgroup H`, `H.map (...)`, `.subgroupMap H`, `Subgroup.mem_map_equiv`, and `MulEquiv.normal_map_iff` at call sites.
findings.issue: `basepointChangeSubgroup`, `basepointChangeSubgroupEquiv`, and the membership/coercion/normality lemmas duplicate existing `MulEquiv` subgroup transport API.

summary: The added API is a direct specialization of existing Mathlib subgroup transport along a `MulEquiv`, instantiated with `FundamentalGroup.fundamentalGroupMulEquivOfPath`.
